events.headline: 降灰予報（定時）
events.slug: 降灰予報定時
sources: 気象庁 地震・火山

members.title: 降灰予報（定時）
members.snippet: 【火山名　薩摩硫黄島　降灰予報（定時）】　現在、薩摩硫黄島は噴火警戒レベル２（火口周辺規制）です。薩摩硫黄島で噴火が発生した場合には、２４日０９時から１２時までは火口から南東方向に降灰が予想されます。
members.source: 気象庁 地震・火山

members.title: Norway Viking Row gets ‘resign’ twist in ‘Cockroach’ protest
members.snippet: Cockroach Janty Party-led protesters in Mumbai, India recreated Norway’s viral Viking Row, replacing ‘ro’ with ‘resign’.

members.title: Two Palestinians shot dead by Israeli forces as West Bank fields set ablaze
members.snippet: Two men were killed in the town of Beit Furik, east of Nablus. An Israeli settler was also reportedly stabbed.

members.title: In India, fear has switched sides
members.snippet: By refusing to be intimidated, India’s students have turned a protest over education into a crisis for Narendra Modi.
